title: Gazan mother reunited with evacuated daughter after two years
summary_full: The girl is among at least eight children who were premature newborns when they were evacuated during heavy fighting in Gaza at the start of the war.
summary_public: The girl is among at least eight children who were premature newborns when they were evacuated during heavy fighting in Gaza at the start of the war.
